CREATE TABLE event_schedule (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_name VARCHAR(100), event_time TIME(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
SELECT event_name FROM event_schedule WHERE event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' > '2023-10-01 12:00:00';
SELECT event_id, event_name, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' as utc_time FROM event_schedule WHERE event_time BETWEEN '2023-10-01 00:00:00' AND '2023-10-01 23:59:59';
CREATE TABLE time_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, log_time TIME(6) WITH TIME ZONE);
SELECT AVG(log_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') FROM time_logs;
SELECT event_name FROM event_schedule WHERE event_time::TIME(0) = (SELECT MAX(log_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') FROM time_logs);
SELECT e.event_name, l.log_time FROM event_schedule e JOIN time_logs l ON e.event_time::DATE = l.log_time::DATE WHERE l.log_time > '2023-10-01 17:00:00';
CREATE TABLE user_actions (user_id INT, action_time TIME(2) WITH TIME ZONE, PRIMARY KEY (user_id, action_time));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_actions WHERE action_time BETWEEN '2023-10-01 09:00:00' AND '2023-10-01 12:00:00' AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';

WITH recent_events AS (SELECT event_name FROM event_schedule WHERE event_time > '2023-10-01 12:00:00+01:00') SELECT re.event_name, COUNT(*) FROM recent_events re LEFT JOIN user_actions ua ON ua.action_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' = re.event_time GROUP BY re.event_name;
